problem.title: Missing Number
problem.description: Given an array nums containing n distinct numbers in the range [0, n], return the only number in the range that is missing from the array.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – XOR
solutions.description: XOR every index i and every element nums[i] together, starting with n. Because XOR is self-inverse, every number that appears in both the index range and the array cancels out, leaving only the missing number. The key insight is that XOR-ing a complete set 0..n with all elements of nums eliminates all present numbers and isolates the one that is absent.
